title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Motilal Oswal - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Motilal Oswal - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Motilal Oswal in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Motilal Oswal:
Motilal Oswal is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
